title: Implement user authentication module
description_text: As a user, I want to log in with my credentials so that I can access my personalized dashboard securely.
comment_text: Have we considered OAuth2 integration? The current implementation should support token-based auth for API consumers.

title: Fix session timeout handling
description_text: Sessions expire without warning, causing users to lose unsaved work. Need graceful timeout with auto-save.
comment_text: This is a P1 blocker for the release. Please prioritize the auto-save mechanism before addressing the UI notification.

title: Add password reset functionality
description_text: As a user, I want to reset my password via email so that I can regain access if I forget my credentials.
comment_text: Make sure the reset token expires after 24 hours. Also verify the email template renders correctly on mobile clients.

title: Database connection pool optimization
description_text: Connection pool exhaustion under load causes 503 errors. Need to implement connection recycling and monitoring.
comment_text: Root cause identified: connections not being returned to pool after transaction rollback. Fix needs to cover all DAO classes.

title: Implement role-based access control
description_text: As an admin, I want to assign roles to users so that I can control access to different system features.
comment_text: Consider using a permission matrix rather than simple role hierarchy. This gives more flexibility for custom roles later.

title: Add API rate limiting
description_text: As a system administrator, I want to limit API requests per user so that the system remains stable under heavy usage.
comment_text: We need to decide between sliding window and token bucket algorithms. Token bucket is more forgiving for burst traffic.

title: Implement request logging middleware
description_text: As a developer, I want all API requests logged so that I can debug issues and monitor system health.
comment_text: Ensure PII is redacted from logs. We need to comply with GDPR requirements for any EU-based deployments.

title: Create API documentation endpoint
description_text: As a developer, I want auto-generated API docs so that I can understand available endpoints without reading source code.
comment_text: Swagger/OpenAPI 3.0 format preferred. Include request/response examples for each endpoint.

title: Fix CORS configuration for production
description_text: CORS headers are too permissive in production. Need to restrict to known origins only.
comment_text: Whitelist approach is correct. Make sure to handle preflight OPTIONS requests properly for complex CORS scenarios.

title: Implement webhook notification system
description_text: As an integrator, I want to receive webhook notifications for key events so that I can build automated workflows.
comment_text: Consider retry logic with exponential backoff for failed webhook deliveries. Also need a dead letter queue for permanent failures.

title: Design responsive dashboard layout
description_text: As a user, I want a responsive dashboard so that I can use the application on both desktop and mobile devices.
comment_text: Mobile-first approach recommended. Use CSS Grid for the main layout and Flexbox for component-level arrangements.

title: Implement dark mode toggle
description_text: As a user, I want to switch between light and dark themes so that I can use the app comfortably in different environments.
comment_text: Store preference in localStorage and respect system prefers-color-scheme media query as default.

title: Fix chart rendering on Safari
description_text: Charts fail to render on Safari 16+ due to canvas API compatibility issue.
comment_text: Safari has known issues with OffscreenCanvas. Fallback to standard Canvas API when OffscreenCanvas is unavailable.

title: Add keyboard navigation support
description_text: As a user with accessibility needs, I want full keyboard navigation so that I can use the application without a mouse.
comment_text: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance is the minimum target. Focus management for modal dialogs is critical.

title: Implement lazy loading for images
description_text: As a user, I want images to load on demand so that initial page load is faster.
comment_text: Use Intersection Observer API. Include proper placeholder dimensions to prevent layout shift (CLS optimization).

title: Create reusable form validation library
description_text: As a developer, I want a shared validation library so that form validation is consistent across all modules.
comment_text: Support both synchronous and async validators. Schema-based validation (like Zod or Yup patterns) would be ideal.

title: Fix memory leak in real-time updates
description_text: WebSocket connections not properly cleaned up on component unmount, causing progressive memory degradation.
comment_text: Confirmed via Chrome DevTools heap snapshots. The event listener cleanup in useEffect return is missing in 3 components.

title: Add export to PDF functionality
description_text: As a user, I want to export reports as PDF so that I can share them with stakeholders who dont have system access.
comment_text: Server-side rendering preferred for consistent output. Consider Puppeteer or wkhtmltopdf for the generation pipeline.

title: Implement search with autocomplete
description_text: As a user, I want search suggestions as I type so that I can find items quickly without knowing exact names.
comment_text: Debounce input at 300ms minimum. Cache recent results client-side to reduce API calls for repeated searches.

title: Optimize bundle size
description_text: Main JS bundle exceeds 2MB. Need code splitting and tree shaking to improve initial load performance.
comment_text: Dynamic imports for route-level splitting. Move chart libraries to separate chunks since not all pages need them.

title: Set up CI/CD pipeline
description_text: As a developer, I want automated build and deployment so that code changes are tested and deployed consistently.
comment_text: GitHub Actions recommended. Include lint/test/build/deploy stages. Gate deployments on test passage.

title: Implement database migration system
description_text: As a developer, I want versioned database migrations so that schema changes are reproducible across environments.
comment_text: Migration files should be idempotent. Include both up and down migrations for rollback capability.

title: Configure monitoring and alerting
description_text: As a SRE, I want system monitoring with alerts so that I can respond to issues before users are impacted.
comment_text: Prometheus + Grafana stack. Alert on: error rate > 1% and p99 latency > 2s and disk usage > 80%.

title: Fix Docker build caching
description_text: Docker builds take 15+ minutes due to cache invalidation on every dependency change.
comment_text: Multi-stage builds with separate dependency layer. Copy package.json before source code to leverage layer caching.

title: Implement blue-green deployment
description_text: As a DevOps engineer, I want zero-downtime deployments so that users are not affected during releases.
comment_text: Start with simple approach: spin up new version and swap load balancer target. Health check endpoint is prerequisite.

title: Create data import wizard
description_text: As an admin, I want a guided import process so that I can migrate data from legacy systems without technical knowledge.
comment_text: Support CSV and JSON formats initially. Validate data before import and provide detailed error report for invalid rows.

title: Implement data versioning
description_text: As a data analyst, I want to see historical versions of records so that I can track changes over time.
comment_text: Event sourcing pattern for critical entities. Store diffs rather than full snapshots to minimize storage costs.

title: Fix timezone handling in reports
description_text: Report timestamps show server timezone instead of user timezone causing confusion for distributed teams.
comment_text: Store all timestamps in UTC. Convert to user timezone only at the presentation layer. Never store local times.

title: Add bulk operations API
description_text: As a power user, I want to perform bulk updates so that I can manage large datasets efficiently.
comment_text: Batch size limit of 1000 per request. Use database transactions for atomicity. Return detailed per-item results.

title: Implement data archival policy
description_text: As a system admin, I want automated data archival so that the primary database remains performant.
comment_text: Archive records older than 2 years to cold storage. Maintain queryable index for archived data.

title: Create notification preferences system
description_text: As a user, I want to control which notifications I receive so that I am not overwhelmed by irrelevant alerts.
comment_text: Per-channel preferences (email/push/in-app). Default to all enabled. Batch digest option for low-priority notifications.

title: Fix duplicate event processing
description_text: Events processed multiple times due to missing idempotency check in the consumer pipeline.
comment_text: Add idempotency key based on event ID + timestamp hash. Check before processing and skip duplicates.

title: Implement full-text search
description_text: As a user, I want to search across all text fields so that I can find relevant records regardless of which field contains the match.
comment_text: Elasticsearch for the search index. Keep it as a read-optimized projection synced from primary DB via change data capture.

title: Add data quality dashboard
description_text: As a data steward, I want visibility into data quality metrics so that I can identify and address data issues proactively.
comment_text: Track completeness and consistency and timeliness. Flag records failing validation rules. Weekly trend reports.

title: Optimize query performance for large datasets
description_text: Complex queries timeout on tables with >1M rows. Need query optimization and proper indexing strategy.
comment_text: Add composite indexes for common filter combinations. EXPLAIN ANALYZE all slow queries. Consider materialized views for dashboards.

title: Implement multi-language support
description_text: As a user, I want the application in my preferred language so that I can use it without language barriers.
comment_text: Use i18n framework with JSON translation files. Support RTL layouts for Arabic/Hebrew. Pluralization rules vary by language.

title: Create translation management workflow
description_text: As a translator, I want a structured workflow for managing translations so that I can efficiently maintain language packs.
comment_text: Crowdin or Lokalise integration for professional translation management. Auto-detect untranslated strings in CI.

title: Fix date formatting for locales
description_text: Dates display in US format (MM/DD/YYYY) regardless of user locale setting.
comment_text: Use Intl.DateTimeFormat API. Respect the locale from user preferences not browser default.

title: Add currency formatting support
description_text: As a user, I want monetary values displayed in my local currency format so that financial data is immediately understandable.
comment_text: Intl.NumberFormat handles most cases. Store amounts in smallest unit (cents) with currency code. Format at display only.

title: Implement content delivery optimization
description_text: As a user in a remote region, I want fast page loads so that my experience is not degraded by network latency.
comment_text: CDN for static assets. Edge caching for API responses where possible. Consider regional read replicas for database.

title: Design plugin architecture
description_text: As a developer, I want to extend the system via plugins so that custom functionality can be added without modifying core code.
comment_text: Event-driven plugin system. Plugins register hooks for lifecycle events. Sandboxed execution for security.

title: Create plugin marketplace
description_text: As an admin, I want to browse and install plugins from a marketplace so that I can extend functionality easily.
comment_text: Start with curated list. Include version compatibility checks. Support auto-update with rollback capability.

title: Implement plugin sandboxing
description_text: As a security engineer, I want plugins to run in isolation so that a malicious plugin cannot compromise the core system.
comment_text: VM-level isolation for server plugins. Content Security Policy for frontend plugins. API allowlist per plugin.

title: Fix plugin dependency resolution
description_text: Plugins with conflicting dependencies cause runtime errors when both are active.
comment_text: Implement semantic versioning checks. Detect conflicts at install time. Allow dependency pinning per plugin.

title: Add plugin configuration UI
description_text: As an admin, I want a visual interface for configuring plugins so that I do not need to edit configuration files manually.
comment_text: Schema-driven form generation. Plugin authors define config schema and UI renders appropriate controls automatically.

title: Implement real-time collaboration
description_text: As a team member, I want to see others edits in real-time so that we can work on the same document simultaneously.
comment_text: CRDT-based approach for conflict-free merging. WebSocket for transport. Operational Transform is an alternative but more complex.

title: Add commenting and annotation system
description_text: As a reviewer, I want to leave comments on specific elements so that I can provide targeted feedback.
comment_text: Anchor comments to document positions. Support threaded replies. Resolve/unresolve workflow for actionable items.

title: Fix concurrent edit conflicts
description_text: Two users editing the same field simultaneously causes one users changes to be silently overwritten.
comment_text: Optimistic concurrency control with version vectors. Show conflict resolution UI when detected. Auto-merge non-overlapping changes.

title: Implement presence indicators
description_text: As a user, I want to see who else is viewing the same page so that I know when to coordinate on changes.
comment_text: WebSocket-based presence. Show avatar/cursor positions. Auto-expire after 30s of inactivity.

title: Add change history and rollback
description_text: As a user, I want to see the history of changes and revert to previous versions so that I can recover from mistakes.
comment_text: Store snapshots at meaningful intervals not every keystroke. Diff visualization between versions. One-click rollback.

title: Create onboarding tutorial system
description_text: As a new user, I want guided tutorials so that I can learn the system quickly without external documentation.
comment_text: Step-by-step overlay guides. Track completion per user. Allow skip and resume later. Context-sensitive help tooltips.

title: Implement user feedback collection
description_text: As a product manager, I want to collect user feedback in-app so that I can understand pain points and priorities.
comment_text: NPS survey after key milestones. Contextual feedback button on every page. Aggregate results in admin dashboard.

title: Fix navigation breadcrumb inconsistency
description_text: Breadcrumbs show incorrect path when navigating via search results or deep links.
comment_text: Reconstruct breadcrumb from URL path segments rather than navigation history. Handle dynamic route parameters correctly.

title: Add customizable workspace layouts
description_text: As a power user, I want to arrange my workspace panels so that I can optimize my workflow for my specific tasks.
comment_text: Drag-and-drop panel arrangement. Save layouts per user. Provide default layouts for common workflows.

title: Implement undo/redo system
description_text: As a user, I want to undo and redo actions so that I can quickly correct mistakes without navigating to edit forms.
comment_text: Command pattern for action history. Support multi-level undo (at least 20 steps). Persist across page navigations.

title: Set up automated security scanning
description_text: As a security engineer, I want automated vulnerability scanning so that security issues are caught before deployment.
comment_text: SAST in CI pipeline. Dependency audit on every build. DAST against staging environment weekly.

title: Implement audit logging
description_text: As a compliance officer, I want comprehensive audit logs so that all system actions are traceable.
comment_text: Log who did what and when and from where. Immutable append-only storage. Retention policy: 7 years for financial data.

title: Fix XSS vulnerability in user input
description_text: User-generated content rendered without sanitization allows script injection.
comment_text: Sanitize all user input server-side. Use Content-Security-Policy headers. Encode output contextually (HTML/JS/URL).

title: Add two-factor authentication
description_text: As a security-conscious user, I want 2FA so that my account is protected even if my password is compromised.
comment_text: TOTP-based (Google Authenticator compatible). Backup codes for recovery. Enforce for admin accounts.

title: Implement secrets management
description_text: As a DevOps engineer, I want centralized secrets management so that credentials are not stored in code or config files.
comment_text: HashiCorp Vault or AWS Secrets Manager. Rotate secrets automatically. Audit access to secrets.

title: Create performance testing framework
description_text: As a QA engineer, I want automated performance tests so that regressions are detected before production.
comment_text: k6 or JMeter for load testing. Baseline metrics for key flows. Run against staging on every release candidate.

title: Implement visual regression testing
description_text: As a QA engineer, I want automated visual comparisons so that UI changes are detected and reviewed.
comment_text: Percy or Chromatic integration. Screenshot comparison for key pages. Acceptable diff threshold: 0.1%.

title: Fix flaky integration tests
description_text: Integration test suite has 15% failure rate due to timing issues and test data contamination.
comment_text: Isolate test data per test case. Use deterministic waits instead of sleep. Reset state in beforeEach not afterAll.

title: Add API contract testing
description_text: As a developer, I want API contract tests so that breaking changes to APIs are detected immediately.
comment_text: Pact or similar consumer-driven contract testing. Generate contracts from OpenAPI spec. Run in CI on every PR.

title: Implement chaos engineering practices
description_text: As a SRE, I want controlled failure injection so that we can verify system resilience under adverse conditions.
comment_text: Start with simple experiments: kill random pods and inject network latency. Gradually increase blast radius.

title: Design microservice communication patterns
description_text: As an architect, I want standardized inter-service communication so that services can evolve independently.
comment_text: Synchronous: gRPC for internal and REST for external. Asynchronous: message queue for event-driven flows.

title: Implement circuit breaker pattern
description_text: As a developer, I want circuit breakers on external calls so that cascading failures are prevented.
comment_text: Three states: closed and open and half-open. Configure thresholds per dependency. Expose metrics for monitoring.

title: Fix service discovery inconsistency
description_text: Services intermittently fail to discover peers after deployment causing request routing failures.
comment_text: DNS-based discovery TTL too aggressive. Increase TTL and add client-side caching with background refresh.

title: Add health check endpoints
description_text: As a platform engineer, I want standardized health checks so that orchestrators can manage service lifecycle correctly.
comment_text: Liveness: is process alive. Readiness: can accept traffic. Include dependency checks in readiness probe.

title: Implement event-driven architecture
description_text: As an architect, I want event-driven communication between services so that they are loosely coupled and independently deployable.
comment_text: Event bus with guaranteed delivery. Schema registry for event contracts. Dead letter queue for failed processing.

title: Create admin user management panel
description_text: As an admin, I want to manage users from a web interface so that I do not need database access for routine operations.
comment_text: CRUD operations for users. Bulk import via CSV. Role assignment interface. Activity log per user.

title: Implement system configuration UI
description_text: As an admin, I want to modify system settings through the UI so that configuration changes do not require redeployment.
comment_text: Group settings by category. Validate before save. Show which settings require restart. Audit config changes.

title: Fix admin panel performance with large user base
description_text: Admin panel becomes unresponsive when user count exceeds 10000 due to loading all users at once.
comment_text: Server-side pagination with cursor-based approach. Virtual scrolling on client. Debounced search filter.

title: Add system health dashboard
description_text: As an admin, I want a health overview dashboard so that I can quickly assess system status without checking multiple tools.
comment_text: Aggregate metrics from all services. Traffic light status indicators. Auto-refresh every 30 seconds.

title: Implement backup and restore functionality
description_text: As an admin, I want automated backups with easy restore so that data can be recovered in case of failure.
comment_text: Scheduled backups with configurable retention. Point-in-time recovery. Test restores automatically.

title: Implement email notification service
description_text: As a user, I want email notifications for important events so that I stay informed even when not actively using the system.
comment_text: Template-based emails. Queue for reliable delivery. Unsubscribe link in every email. SPF/DKIM for deliverability.

title: Add push notification support
description_text: As a mobile user, I want push notifications so that I receive timely updates on my device.
comment_text: Firebase Cloud Messaging for cross-platform. Web Push API for browser. Respect quiet hours per user timezone.

title: Fix email delivery delays
description_text: Emails are delayed by 30+ minutes during peak hours due to synchronous sending in the request lifecycle.
comment_text: Move to async queue-based delivery. Process queue with dedicated worker. Monitor queue depth and alert on backlog.

title: Implement notification batching
description_text: As a user, I want notification digests so that I receive a summary instead of individual notifications for related events.
comment_text: Configurable batch window (5min/1hr/daily). Group by source/type. Smart summary generation.

title: Create notification center UI
description_text: As a user, I want a centralized notification inbox so that I can review all notifications in one place.
comment_text: Mark as read/unread. Filter by type. Clear all. Badge count on navigation icon. Persistent across sessions.
